original: Any more crystals and you’d be lucky to move, let alone fight.
e.capitalA+e.short+" considers it unwise to use another crystal on "+t.mfn("him","her","it")+"self.
You hold the crystal aloft and break it apart, coating yourself with a splash of liquid goo. It clings to your body, rapidly recrystallizing into glittering, rock-hard plates!

t.capitalA+t.short+" breaks open a crystal shard, soaking "+t.mfn("him","her","it")+"self in a greenish goo that rapidly hardens into crystal! You’ll have a hard time hurting "+t.mfn("him","her","it")+"!
